name: Pepper Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Knead the dough for about 15 minutes until smooth and elastic.
3. Take small portions of the dough (about the size of a walnut).
4. Shape each portion into a finger twist or knot.
5. Place the shaped biscuits on an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. The biscuits can be frozen for later use.
